message:
fix: batch194-195 audit — 3 MEDIUM bugs fixed across 8 files (24,906L audited)

Batch194 (16,744L, all SOUND): trace/event.rs, trace/crashpack.rs,
obligation/choreography/mod.rs, runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs

Batch195 (8,162L, 3 MEDIUM + 6 LOW):
- websocket/frame.rs: payload_len u64→usize truncation on 32-bit (try_from)
- h2/stream.rs: consume_send/recv_window panic+overflow (i64 arithmetic)
- distributed/recovery.rs: object_size u64→usize truncation (try_from)
- h2/hpack.rs: SOUND (2470L, 0 bugs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
